block.jsg.sg_redstone_dialer_input_block: Dial a stargate using redstone signal

To dial a symbol you need to set symbol ID%nl%using listed inputs then engage it.%nl%Selected symbol id = ((Right * 16) + Front)%nl%%nl%§lInputs:%nl%Top: Engage gate%nl%Bottom: Enable DHD Dialing animation%nl%Left: Engage symbol%nl%Right: 2nd bit of symbol ID%nl%Front: 1st bit of symbol ID
block.jsg.sg_redstone_state_output_block: Get redstone output by current stargate state
§lOutput:%nl%0: Idle%nl%1: Dialing DHD%nl%2: Dialing Computer%nl%3: Engaged Incoming%nl%4: Engaged Outgoing%nl%5: Unstable%nl%6: Failing%nl%7: Incoming Wormhole

gui.jsg.ingame_config.force_unstable.com: If set to Enabled, stargate's event horizon will be unstable permanently (this also effects connected gate on the other side)
gui.jsg.ingame_config.orange_shield.comm: Switch shield to orange color on this gate
gui.jsg.ingame_config.point_of_origin.co: Variant of the PoO to be used on this gate. This will not change any gate's behaviour - it's only a visual
gui.jsg.ingame_config.spin_ring_incoming: Start spinning the ring when incoming wormhole occurs. This require the Incoming Animations option to be set to Enabled.
gui.jsg.ingame_config.spin_speed.title: Stargate's Ring Rotation Speed
gui.jsg.ingame_config.time_limit_mode.co: Specifies what should the stargate do when the gate opened for more than Stargate Time Limit Time
gui.jsg.ingame_config.time_limit_power.c: Specifies multiplier of stargate's power draw when the gate opened for more than Stargate Time Limit Time and Stargate Time Limit Mode is set to DRAW_MORE_POWER
gui.jsg.ingame_config.time_limit_power.t: Stargate Time Limit Power Draw Multiplier
gui.jsg.ingame_config.time_limit_time.co: How many seconds can be opened before closing/drawing more power (set up by Stargate Time Limit Mode)

item.jsg.crystal_glyph_dhd.tooltip.exten: This crystal allows you to §lDIAL%nl%8 and 9 symbol addresses when%nl%placed into a DHD.%nl%%nl%§oThis upgrade can be combined%nl%§owith other DHD upgrades!
This crystal allows you to §lONLY DISPLAY%nl%gate's Milky Way address when%nl%placed into a stargate.%nl%%nl%§oThis upgrade can be combined%nl%§owith other stargate upgrades!
item.jsg.crystal_glyph_pegasus.tooltip.e: This crystal allows you to §lONLY DISPLAY%nl%gate's Pegasus address when%nl%placed into a stargate.%nl%%nl%§oThis upgrade can be combined%nl%§owith other stargate upgrades!
This crystal allows you to §lONLY DISPLAY%nl%8th and 9th symbols of the gate's address when%nl%placed into a stargate.%nl%%nl%§oThis upgrade can be combined%nl%§owith other stargate upgrades!
This crystal allows you to §lONLY DISPLAY%nl%gate's Universe address when%nl%placed into a stargate.%nl%%nl%§oThis upgrade can be combined%nl%§owith other stargate upgrades!
item.jsg.crystal_upgrade_capacity.toolti: This crystal will increase capacity%nl%of DHD or enable one more slot for%nl%capacitor when placed in transport rings.%nl%%nl%§oThis upgrade can be combined%nl%§owith other DHD and rings upgrades!
item.jsg.crystal_upgrade_efficiency.tool: This crystal will increase efficiency%nl%of DHD's Cold Fusion Reactor.%nl%This reactor will produce%nl%more power per 1mB of Naquadah.%nl%%nl%§oThis upgrade can be combined%nl%§owith other DHD upgrades!

joinWorld.jsg.abydos_update.desc:
In this version, the Abydos dimension got a massive update, and unfortunately, can not load the old Abydos dimension.
By continuing to load the world, the old Abydos dimension will be PERMANENTLY DELETED, and replaced with newly generated one!
joinWorld.jsg.abydos_update.title: New JSG version detected!
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy.armor: Grants +10% protection per level against explosions and reduces explosion knockback
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy.encyclopedia: Prevents 33% of damage at the cost of an extra 25% repair cost at first level
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy.flavor: Probably the best conductor so far!
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy.ranged: Has a 50% chance of doing up to 5 damage over time, more damage at higher levels
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy_raw.encyclop: Grants bonus mining speed at lower depth
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy_raw.flavor: The raw version of naquadah is suitable not only for offerings to your gods.
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy_raw.ranged: Grants -10% durability and +10% projectile power per level
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy_refined.armo: Temporarily boosts melee damage by 1 after taking damage, capping at the total level across all armor
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy_refined.flav: Highly reactive isotope of naquadah. Suitable as a fuel source for generators!
material.jsg.naquadah_alloy_refined.rang: Increases drop chances from mobs killed by arrows
material.jsg.titanium.armor: Reduce damage from fire immune mobs by 5% per level and reduces fire burn time
material.jsg.titanium.encyclopedia: Causes the tool to mine faster by half of the square root of the trait level times lost durability
material.jsg.titanium.flavor: Material better than iron with better properties!
material.jsg.titanium.ranged: Grants -25% durability and +20% projectile power per level
material.jsg.trinium.armor: Reduces damage from melee attacks by 10% per level and boosts movement speed, when using items by 5% per max level
material.jsg.trinium.encyclopedia: Grants +15% durability and melee damage per level
material.jsg.trinium.flavor: Truly durable and lightweight material. Extraction requires a blessing from the Tonane tribe
material.jsg.trinium.ranged: Grants +0.5% accuracy when not on the ground or ladder
menu.tip.abydos_cartouche: TIP: Explore Abydos to find cartouches with stargate addresses.
menu.tip.kawoosh: TIP: Try to avoid standing in front of a Stargate as it activates.
menu.tip.unstable_eh: TIP: Travelling through an unstable wormhole can result in death.
tile.jsg.dhd_block.incoming_wormhole_war: Unable to close an incoming wormhole
